pi_items.source: Confirmed against the explicit path requirement in the task description.
Confirmed by analyzing verifier.py logic which strictly checks the 15 required legal homophone pair tuples.
Confirmed by analyzing verifier.py logic which requires len(groups) >= 20.
Confirmed by analyzing verifier.py logic which checks for len(entries) >= 25 in the legal_terms.talon-list file.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating synthetic homophone system files for Talon Voice. Analysis of the verifier.py logic confirmed the explicit parameter requirements: the target directory must be C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\homophone_system, the CSV file must contain exactly 15 specific legal homophone pairs and a minimum of 20 total pairs, and the .talon-list file must contain at least 25 legal terms. However, critical setup and export PowerShell scripts (setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1) referenced in the task hooks are entirely missing from the task directory. Because export_result.ps1 is missing, the expected C:\task_result.json file will never be generated, rendering the verifier inherently broken and impossible to pass.
